title: NVDA shares fall after export restriction
summary: New export restrictions may affect Nvidia's ability to sell advance AI chips to certain markets

title: Palantir wins $400M Army contract for AI batterfield system
summary: The Department of Defense awarded Palantir a multi-year contract to expand its Maven Smart System across Army units.

title: TSMC reports record Q2 revenue on AI chip demand
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor posted quarterly revenue beating estimates, driven by orders for advanced 3nm process nodes.
